---
title: "Resources"
title-block-style: none
description: "Access chen.ist's collection of tools, guides, templates, and reference materials for cybersecurity, cloud, and software development."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Resources</h1>
    <p>Tools, guides, templates, and presentations to help you build better infrastructure.</p>
    <a href="#browse" class="ev-btn">Browse resources</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BROWSE BY FORMAT — image cards -->
<div class="m-s" id="browse" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Browse by format</h2>
    <p class="sub">Everything we publish, in the format you prefer.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/resources/guides/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Guides"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Guides</h3><p>In-depth walkthroughs for security, cloud, and APIs.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/resources/keynotes/zero-trust-security/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Presentations"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Presentations</h3><p>Interactive keynotes and slide decks from our team.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/resources/templates/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Templates"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Templates</h3><p>Security policies, IR plans, and project documents.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/resources/tools/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Tools"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Tools</h3><p>Password checker, zero trust assessment, and more.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- BROWSE BY TOPIC -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Browse by topic</h2>
    <p class="sub">Find resources for your specific domain.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/resources/guides/security/implementation-guide.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Security</div><h3>Implementation Guide</h3><p>Best practices, compliance checklists, and access control.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/resources/guides/cloud/migration-handbook.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Cloud</div><h3>Migration Handbook</h3><p>Step-by-step strategies for successful cloud migration.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <!-- API guide hidden for now -->
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURED: Security -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security resources"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Security<br>Best Practices</h2>
        <p>A comprehensive guide to implementing robust security practices in your organization. Covers access control, encryption, monitoring, and incident response procedures.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/resources/guides/security/implementation-guide.html" class="m-lk">Read the guide</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURED: Cloud -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud resources"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Cloud Migration<br>Handbook</h2>
        <p>Step-by-step strategies for a successful cloud migration. Assessment, planning, execution, and optimization — with minimal disruption to your operations.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/resources/guides/cloud/migration-handbook.html" class="m-lk">Read the handbook</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PRESENTATIONS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Presentations</h2>
    <p class="sub">Keynotes and talks from our team.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/resources/keynotes/zero-trust-security/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Zero Trust"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Zero Trust Security</h3><p>Principles and implementation strategies for zero trust architecture.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/keynotes/cloud-security/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud Security"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cloud Security</h3><p>Key strategies for securing cloud environments across providers.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/keynotes/cyberawareness/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Cyber Awareness"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cyber Awareness</h3><p>Essential practices for digital protection and security hygiene.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need something specific?</h2>
    <p>Our team can help you find the right resources or create custom documentation for your project.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a call</a>
      <a href="/blog.html" class="m-bo">Read our blog</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
